name: 04 — Vercel Deployment

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'preview', vercel_deployment_id: $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.vercel_deployment_id, vercel_url: $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.vercel_url, permanent_url: 'https://' + $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.slug + '.mysitehq.com.au', expires_at: new Date(Date.now() + 3 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(), deploy_ms: Date.now() - $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.deploy_start }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.lead_id, step: 'live', message: 'Your preview site is ready!', payload: { url: 'https://' + $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.slug + '.mysitehq.com.au', expires_at: new Date(Date.now() + 3 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString() } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.lead_id, event_type: 'site.deployed', event_data: { slug: $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.slug, vercel_url: $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.vercel_url, permanent_url: 'https://' + $('Extract Deployment URL').first().json.slug + '.mysitehq.com.au' }, source: 'n8n' }) }}

notes: Multi-tenant deployment: does NOT create a new Vercel project per customer. Instead it calls /api/revalidate on the existing Next.js app (ISR cache bust), reads the latest deployment ID, and creates a per-slug alias (slug.mysitehq.com.au). The Next.js app must use the slug from hostname to load SiteProps from Supabase at request time. The wildcard DNS record *.mysitehq.com.au must point to Vercel (set up in Cloudflare). Set VERCEL_PROJECT_ID and VERCEL_TOKEN as n8n credentials/variables.
